faqs.question: What spider species are most common in Harrison, NY?
faqs.answer: Harrison residents most frequently encounter common house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and occasionally black widows in woodpiles or garages. Our technicians are trained to identify and effectively treat all spider species found in Westchester County, using targeted methods for each type.
